product_overview: PolyDub provides backend APIs to transcribe, translate, synthesize, and mux multimedia for multilingual dubbing workflows (VOD and previews). It exposes endpoints to run a STT/translation/TTS pipeline, stream TTS previews, and combine dubbed audio with original video via ffmpeg.
core_goals: Provide a reliable VOD dubbing pipeline that accepts uploaded media and returns translated captions and dubbed audio.
Allow fast client-side preview of synthesized speech before full dubbing/export.
Produce a downloadable, muxed MP4 combining original video and generated dubbed audio.
Surface clear error states for missing inputs or processing failures and document operational dependencies (third‑party APIs and ffmpeg).
Minimize information leakage in error responses and reduce risk from unauthenticated, expensive endpoints.

features.name: Dubbing Pipeline API (/api/dub)
features.description: Accept an uploaded media file and target language, run STT -> translation -> TTS pipeline, and return SRT captions plus a base64-encoded MP3 of the dubbed audio.
user_flows: POST /api/dub with multipart file (video or audio) and target_language -> Receive 200 with JSON { srt: string, mp3: base64 string } (happy path: Deepgram STT + translation + TTS succeeded)
POST /api/dub with missing file or missing target_language -> Receive 400 with "Missing parameters" (error: client omitted required fields)
POST /api/dub with valid file/target when third-party API keys are not configured or external call fails -> Receive 500 with processing error message (error: missing API keys or processing error)

features.name: Media Mux API (/api/mux)
features.description: Combine an original video and the generated dubbed audio into a single downloadable MP4 using the host ffmpeg binary.
user_flows: POST /api/mux with multipart original_video file and dubbed_audio file (or base64-decoded audio) -> Receive 200 with video/mp4 stream (happy path: ffmpeg produced muxed MP4)
POST /api/mux with missing video or missing audio parameters -> Receive 400 with "Missing video or audio file" (error: client omitted one or both files)

POST /api/mux with valid inputs on a host without ffmpeg binary or with ffmpeg execution failure -> Receive 500 with "ffmpeg or file processing error" (error: runtime dependency or command execution failed)

features.name: TTS Preview API (/api/tts-preview)
features.description: Synthesize and stream a short preview MPEG audio clip for provided text and voice selection so users can audition voices before full dubbing.
user_flows: POST /api/tts-preview with JSON { text, voice } (or multipart as supported) -> Receive 200 with audio/mpeg stream (happy path: TTS synthesis succeeded and audio is streamed)
POST /api/tts-preview with missing text or voice parameters -> Receive 400 with "Missing parameters" (error: client omitted required fields)

POST /api/tts-preview with valid payload but third-party TTS key missing or synthesis fails -> Receive 500 with "Missing API key or synthesis error" (error: external service failure or misconfiguration)

features.name: VOD Dubbing End-to-End (client orchestration using APIs)
features.description: Client-side flow to upload a video, generate captions and dubbed audio, preview TTS, and export a muxed MP4 for download.
user_flows: POST /api/dub with uploaded video and target_language -> Receive 200 with { srt, mp3 (base64) } -> POST /api/tts-preview with a short sample snippet text and chosen voice -> Receive 200 audio/mpeg stream for audition -> POST /api/mux with original_video file and decoded mp3 audio -> Receive 200 video/mp4 stream (happy path: full VOD dubbing and export)

POST /api/dub with uploaded video but receive 500 due to missing third-party keys -> Receive 500 with processing error -> Client surfaces translation/TTS configuration error and halts export (error flow: external API unavailable)

POST /api/mux with decoded audio but receive 500 because ffmpeg is not present on host -> Receive 500 with "ffmpeg or file processing error" -> Client notifies user that server cannot produce final MP4 (error flow: server environment limitation)

features.name: Dubbing Pipeline API
features.description: Accepts uploaded media, performs STT/translation/TTS pipeline, and returns SRT plus dubbed audio.

endpoints.description: Process uploaded file and target language to return SRT and base64 MP3.

response_schema.500: Missing API keys or processing error

features.name: Media Mux API
features.description: Muxes original video and dubbed audio using ffmpeg and returns MP4 output.

endpoints.description: Combine input video and audio into one downloadable MP4 file.

features.name: TTS Preview API
features.description: Streams synthesized preview audio for provided text/voice inputs.

endpoints.description: Generate and stream preview audio in MPEG format.

response_schema.500: Missing API key or synthesis error

known_limitations.issue: API routes are unauthenticated and open by default.
known_limitations.impact: Public callers can trigger expensive processing.

known_limitations.issue: /api/mux executes shell ffmpeg command directly and depends on host binary presence.
known_limitations.impact: Fails in environments without ffmpeg and increases operational risk.

known_limitations.issue: Error responses expose raw error messages.
known_limitations.impact: May leak internal details to clients.
